name: Lucia (GTA VI)
description:
Lucia is a character in the Grand Theft Auto series, due to appear as one of the protagonists in Grand Theft Auto VI.

She is one of the few female protagonists in the series, the eighth one overall and the second in the current HD Universe continuity, debuting as the first major, non-selectable female protagonist with voice acting and a unique personality. Her voice actress is currently unknown.
creator: enjoyed
